title: Definitions of BI and Bona fide Non-Government Organizations (NGOs)
content:
(c) BI - Bureau of Immigration

(d) Bona fide Non-Government Organizations (NGOs) - refer to non-government, civil society or faith-based organizations duly recognized by the Philippine Embassy as active partners of the Philippine Government in the protection of Filipino migrant workers and the promotion of their welfare.

metadata.source_file: Omnibus IRR of RA 8042 as amended by RA 10022.pdf
